notes: compliance_status: green = no flag beyond general reminders, yellow = needs business confirmation before production launch, red = must fix before any use. needs_localization=true on all variants: Thai-language version recommended before real launch (English-only currently ok for internal testing).

variants.headline: Fresh Soy Milk, Made at Home Every Morning
variants.body: Skip the preservatives. Blend, heat, and enjoy soy milk made from real beans in minutes — no store trips needed.

variants.headline: One Button. Fresh Milk. Zero Mess.
variants.body: Add beans, add water, press start. Joyoung does the rest while you get ready for the day.
variants.compliance_notes: "Zero Mess" is an absolute claim; soften to "Minimal Mess" if no supporting evidence.

variants.headline: Smoothies That Keep Up With Your Morning
variants.body: Powerful blending in seconds — fruits, ice, and greens turn silky smooth for a fast, healthy start.
variants.compliance_notes: "healthy" triggers TH health-claim scrutiny (Food Act B.E. 2522 Sec. 40, FDA Thailand pre-approval for food benefit/quality claims). Recommend replacing with "fast, energizing start" or obtaining FDA Thailand ad approval before production use.

variants.headline: More Power, Less Counter Space
variants.body: A compact blender built for small kitchens without cutting corners on performance.
variants.compliance_notes: Revised after engine cross-check (2026-07-03): "More Power" is a comparative claim with no stated baseline (same pattern as Safer/Stronger/Faster/More efficient). Needs a comparator (e.g. "vs. our previous model") or supporting spec data, otherwise soften to non-comparative wording (e.g. "Powerful Enough for Small Kitchens"). Originally rated green in R01 — corrected on review.

variants.headline: One Pot, Endless Family Dinners
variants.body: Rice, soups, stews — set it and let it cook while you spend time with the people who matter.

variants.headline: Dinner, Simplified
variants.body: Fewer pots, less cleanup, more free time. Cook a full meal with one appliance.

variants.headline: Perfect Rice, Every Single Time
variants.body: Consistent texture and flavor without watching the pot — just the way Thai kitchens like it.
variants.compliance_notes: "Perfect" + "Every...Time" are absolute performance claims; optional to soften to "Consistently Great Rice" to reduce risk.

variants.headline: Built for Daily Use, Designed to Last
variants.body: Durable components and simple controls made for kitchens that cook every day.
variants.compliance_notes: "Designed to Last" borders on absolute durability claim; soften if no durability test data exists.

variants.headline: Upgrade Your Kitchen This Season
variants.body: New arrivals from Joyoung — practical appliances for everyday Thai households.

variants.headline: Loved by Home Cooks Across Thailand
variants.body: Thousands of households trust Joyoung for reliable, everyday kitchen appliances.
variants.compliance_notes: Unsupported quantified/nationwide social-proof claim (both headline and body). Needs real sales/customer data or testimonials before production use, or rephrase to non-quantified language (e.g. "Trusted by home cooks in Thailand").
